query:
INSERT INTO "user" (
  "openId",
  "name",
  "email",
  "role",
  "loginMethod",
  "lastSignedIn",
  "createdAt",
  "updatedAt"
) VALUES (
  'admin-rifa-001',
  'Admin',
  'admin@rifa.local',
  'admin',
  'test',
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
) ON CONFLICT ("openId") DO UPDATE SET
  "lastSignedIn" = NOW(),
  "updatedAt" = NOW();
